tasks.title: Create dashboards/platform/ai-capabilities.json
tasks.description: Create the Grafana AI capabilities dashboard JSON with stat panels (P99 latency, token rate, acceptance rate, rework rate), time-series panels (latency trend, token trend, acceptance trend, rework trend), and AI alert list. Apply DORA 2025 performance band thresholds. Use schemaVersion: 40 and datasource UID references.
acceptance_criteria: All datasource references use uid: prometheus
Stat panels for P99 latency, token rate, acceptance rate, rework rate
Time-series panels for latency P99/P50, token rate, acceptance trend, rework trend

tasks.title: Validate dashboard JSON syntax and convention compliance
tasks.description: Run python3 -m json.tool on the dashboard file. Verify no numeric datasource IDs, all UIDs reference 'prometheus', and schemaVersion is 40.
acceptance_criteria: No numeric IDs in datasource references
